sci_medgel.name: Medgel Injector
sci_medgel.description: Cold foam that seals hull breaches in flesh just as well as steel.

sci_power_cell.name: Fusion Power Cell
sci_power_cell.description: A palm-sized sun; slot it to recharge an exosuit's reserves.

sci_deflector.name: Deflector Array
sci_deflector.description: A shimmering kinetic field that shrugs off incoming fire.

sci_nanite_purge.name: Nanite Purge Canister
sci_nanite_purge.description: Counter-swarm nanites that scrub hostile code and toxins alike.

sci_singularity_core.name: Contained Singularity Core
sci_singularity_core.description: A droplet of caged gravity. Reactor-grade. Absurdly valuable.
